items.title: Agentic Workflow Builder
items.description: Multi-tenant platform enabling teams to build complex enterprise workflows using natural language prompts. Innovative agentic loop aimed at reducing context rot with large conversation histories.

items.title: vPlay - AI Native IDE
items.description: Cloud-based AI native in-browser IDE aimed at left-shifting developer setup inertia, with projected annual savings exceeding $1M.

items.title: Active-Active Message Queue
items.description: Designed and implemented Active-Active Message Queue Architecture for distributed enterprise job execution engine, resulting in 60% improvement in p95 SLAs and 30% reduction in resource utilization.

items.title: Active-Active Dual Region Writer
items.description: Innovated application architecture with RDMS based on conflict avoidance strategy for split brain coupled with in-built Disaster Recovery state machine.

items.title: Infrastructure Lifecycle Orchestration
items.description: Optimizing Compute Infrastructure Lifecycle Management to achieve decommissioning SLAs of <6 hours for virtualized assets and sub-week SLAs for physical hardware.

items.title: Flight Management Systems
items.description: Wrote safety and mission critical software for UI and Display Proxy layers of Next Gen FMS powering cockpits of Boeing, Airbus, Dassault, and Gulfstream aircraft.

publication.heading: Publication
publication.title: System and method of locking and ranking the resource for utilization in a distributed scheduling system
publication.authorsAndDate: S. Mukherjee, D. RC, N. Kumar, and A. P | April 6, 2022
